'''shoralaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:fob|fob]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-r-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fob|fob]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| shoralaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shoralithi|shoralithi]] || [[word:shoraliji|shoraliji]] || [[word:shoralishi|shoralishi]] || [[word:shoraliki|shoraliki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shoraluthuthu|shoraluthuthu]] || [[word:shoralujuju|shoralujuju]] || [[word:shoralushushu|shoralushushu]] || [[word:shoralukuku|shoralukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shoraluthu|shoraluthu]] || [[word:shoraluju|shoraluju]] || [[word:shoralushu|shoralushu]] || [[word:shoraluku|shoraluku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shoralufthuf|shoralufthuf]] || [[word:shoralufjuf|shoralufjuf]] || [[word:shoralufshuf|shoralufshuf]] || [[word:shoralufkuf|shoralufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shoralethe|shoralethe]] || [[word:shoraleje|shoraleje]] || [[word:shoraleshe|shoraleshe]] || [[word:shoraleke|shoraleke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shoralothotho|shoralothotho]] || [[word:shoralojojo|shoralojojo]] || [[word:shoraloshosho|shoraloshosho]] || [[word:shoralokoko|shoralokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shoralotho|shoralotho]] || [[word:shoralojo|shoralojo]] || [[word:shoralosho|shoralosho]] || [[word:shoraloko|shoraloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shoralofthof|shoralofthof]] || [[word:shoralofjof|shoralofjof]] || [[word:shoralofshof|shoralofshof]] || [[word:shoralofkof|shoralofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:shoralĂŻfthĂŻf|shoralĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shoralĂŻfjĂŻf|shoralĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shoralĂŻfshĂŻf|shoralĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shoralĂŻfkĂŻf|shoralĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:shoralĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|shoralĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shoralĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|shoralĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shoralĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|shoralĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shoralĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|shoralĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:shoralĂŻfthĂŻf|shoralĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shoralĂŻfjĂŻf|shoralĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shoralĂŻfshĂŻf|shoralĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shoralĂŻfkĂŻf|shoralĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:shoralĂŻfthĂŻf|shoralĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shoralĂŻfjĂŻf|shoralĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shoralĂŻfshĂŻf|shoralĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shoralĂŻfkĂŻf|shoralĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shoralĂŠthĂŠ|shoralĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:shoralĂŠjĂŠ|shoralĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:shoralĂŠshĂŠ|shoralĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:shoralĂŠkĂŠ|shoralĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shoralathatha|shoralathatha]] || [[word:shoralajaja|shoralajaja]] || [[word:shoralashasha|shoralashasha]] || [[word:shoralakaka|shoralakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shoralatha|shoralatha]] || [[word:shoralaja|shoralaja]] || [[word:shoralasha|shoralasha]] || [[word:shoralaka|shoralaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shoralafthaf|shoralafthaf]] || [[word:shoralafjaf|shoralafjaf]] || [[word:shoralafshaf|shoralafshaf]] || [[word:shoralafkaf|shoralafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:shoralasha|shoralasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:shoralshĂ«sha|shoralshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shoralrosha|shoralrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shoralmusha|shoralmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:shoralyasha|shoralyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshoralnkshĂ«sha|goshoralnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshoralnkrosha|goshoralnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshoralnkmusha|goshoralnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshoralnkyasha|goshoralnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:shoraralasha|shoraralasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shoraralshĂ«sha|shoraralshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shoraralrosha|shoraralrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shoraralmusha|shoraralmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shoraralyasha|shoraralyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshoraralnkshĂ«sha|goshoraralnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshoraralnkrosha|goshoraralnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshoraralnkmusha|goshoraralnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshoraralnkyasha|goshoraralnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:sherĂŠlasha|sherĂŠlasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:sherĂŠlshĂ«sha|sherĂŠlshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sherĂŠlrosha|sherĂŠlrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sherĂŠlmusha|sherĂŠlmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:sherĂŠlyasha|sherĂŠlyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosherĂŠlnkshĂ«sha|gosherĂŠlnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosherĂŠlnkrosha|gosherĂŠlnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosherĂŠlnkmusha|gosherĂŠlnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosherĂŠlnkyasha|gosherĂŠlnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:shorfalasha|shorfalasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shorfalshĂ«sha|shorfalshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shorfalrosha|shorfalrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shorfalmusha|shorfalmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shorfalyasha|shorfalyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshorfalnkshĂ«sha|goshorfalnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshorfalnkrosha|goshorfalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshorfalnkmusha|goshorfalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshorfalnkyasha|goshorfalnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
